response.global_analysis: The video segment contains dialogue between IRyS and Ouro Kronii. IRyS (red-haired) is outside a cage while Kronii (blue-haired) is inside. The scene focuses on their argument over a dead fly, followed by negotiations for Kronii's release. No vocal music is present in this segment, consistent with the reference JSON. Timestamps are strictly aligned with the spoken dialogue.

subtitles.original: No, you can't talk to it like that.
subtitles.english: No, you can't talk to it like that.

subtitles.original: Why are you talking to a dead fly?
subtitles.english: Why are you talking to a dead fly?

subtitles.original: Well, you think I have anyone else to talk to?
subtitles.english: Well, you think I have anyone else to talk to?

subtitles.original: Oh, so you don't deny that it's a dead fly!
subtitles.english: Oh, so you don't deny that it's a dead fly!

subtitles.original: It's... I mean, I mean... or you?
subtitles.english: It's... I mean, I mean... or you?

subtitles.original: Like, what are you?
subtitles.english: Like, what are you?

subtitles.original: Like, what's that little thing on your head?
subtitles.english: Like, what's that little thing on your head?

subtitles.original: It's... it's...
subtitles.english: It's... it's...

subtitles.original: It's different from the halo on the dead fly, okay?
subtitles.english: It's different from the halo on the dead fly, okay?

subtitles.original: Maybe you're a fly! Maybe you have wings!
subtitles.english: Maybe you're a fly! Maybe you have wings!

subtitles.original: What's the difference between you and that thing?
subtitles.english: What's the difference between you and that thing?

subtitles.original: Do I look like a fly?
subtitles.english: Do I look like a fly?

subtitles.original: Yeah!
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: I'm not talking to you anymore.
subtitles.english: I'm not talking to you anymore.

subtitles.original: You can stay in there for eternity.
subtitles.english: You can stay in there for eternity.

subtitles.original: Wait! Hey! Hold on!
subtitles.english: Wait! Hey! Hold on!

subtitles.original: Hey, hold on, beautiful woman! Come back here!
subtitles.english: Hey, hold on, beautiful woman! Come back here!

subtitles.original: Come back here! Yoo-hoo! Hello! Beautiful woman!
subtitles.english: Come back here! Yoo-hoo! Hello! Beautiful woman!

subtitles.original: Hello, hello. Hi, yeah.
subtitles.english: Hello, hello. Hi, yeah.

subtitles.original: Um, so, if you happen to open this cage...
subtitles.english: Um, so, if you happen to open this cage...

subtitles.original: You know, you can put it on the tab.
subtitles.english: You know, you can put it on the tab.

subtitles.original: Do you even have money?
subtitles.english: Do you even have money?

subtitles.original: Uh, it can be something else.
subtitles.english: Uh, it can be something else.

subtitles.original: Something even more valuable.
subtitles.english: Something even more valuable.

subtitles.original: More valuable than money?
subtitles.english: More valuable than money?

subtitles.original: More valuable than money.
subtitles.english: More valuable than money.

subtitles.original: You're not lying to me, are you?
subtitles.english: You're not lying to me, are you?

subtitles.original: Yes. And something that comes with the price of free is...
subtitles.english: Yes. And something that comes with the price of free is...

subtitles.original: Guess! My companionship!
subtitles.english: Guess! My companionship!

subtitles.original: Friend?
subtitles.english: Friend?

subtitles.original: Maybe not a friend. I said my companionship.
subtitles.english: Maybe not a friend. I said my companionship.

subtitles.original: Goodbye!
subtitles.english: Goodbye!

subtitles.original: Hey, hey, come on! Okay, maybe for a day!
subtitles.english: Hey, hey, come on! Okay, maybe for a day!

subtitles.original: Hello? For a day!
subtitles.english: Hello? For a day!

subtitles.original: For a day! For a day! For a day!
subtitles.english: For a day! For a day! For a day!

subtitles.original: Now I look like a lonely ass...
subtitles.english: Now I look like a lonely ass...

subtitles.original: Oh, no! Not the lonely ass!
subtitles.english: Oh, no! Not the lonely ass!

subtitles.original: It's okay, it's okay if you're lonely.
subtitles.english: It's okay, it's okay if you're lonely.

subtitles.original: You know what, actually... I'm an angel.
subtitles.english: You know what, actually... I'm an angel.

subtitles.original: Uh-huh.
subtitles.english: Uh-huh.

subtitles.original: We should get along.
subtitles.english: We should get along.

subtitles.original: I am feeling awfully kind right now.
subtitles.english: I am feeling awfully kind right now.

subtitles.original: Oh... then maybe you should...
subtitles.english: Oh... then maybe you should...

subtitles.original: Please beg.
subtitles.english: Please beg.

subtitles.original: If you beg, I'll let you out!
subtitles.english: If you beg, I'll let you out!

subtitles.original: Now beg.
subtitles.english: Now beg.

subtitles.original: I'm gonna speak to your higher-ups about it.
subtitles.english: I'm gonna speak to your higher-ups about it.

subtitles.original: Well, you can't speak to them if you're in this cage!
subtitles.english: Well, you can't speak to them if you're in this cage!

subtitles.original: When I get out of here, you will be fired.
subtitles.english: When I get out of here, you will be fired.

subtitles.original: How are you gonna get out without me?
subtitles.english: How are you gonna get out without me?

subtitles.original: That's the whole point of being in here!
subtitles.english: That's the whole point of being in here!

subtitles.original: Do you want to take a bet? Do you want to take a gamble?
subtitles.english: Do you want to take a bet? Do you want to take a gamble?

subtitles.original: Or do you want to just free me? You should just free me.
subtitles.english: Or do you want to just free me? You should just free me.

subtitles.original: And then maybe I'll beg, or whatever you want.
subtitles.english: And then maybe I'll beg, or whatever you want.

subtitles.original: At the price of my companionship!
subtitles.english: At the price of my companionship!

subtitles.original: I'm breaking the fourth wall! I'm here to let you out!
subtitles.english: I'm breaking the fourth wall! I'm here to let you out!

subtitles.original: Just let me out!
subtitles.english: Just let me out!

subtitles.original: Just beg!
subtitles.english: Just beg!

subtitles.original: It's the magic word! Just a magic word that starts with P!
subtitles.english: It's the magic word! Just a magic word that starts with P!

subtitles.original: Pray.
subtitles.english: Pray.

subtitles.original: Please! Please! Please!
subtitles.english: Please! Please! Please!

subtitles.original: Finally! Finally! Okay.
subtitles.english: Finally! Finally! Okay.

subtitles.original: Fine, because I'm so kind.
subtitles.english: Fine, because I'm so kind.

subtitles.original: Just one please and it would've been all over.
subtitles.english: Just one please and it would've been all over.

subtitles.original: Okay. Let's go.
subtitles.english: Okay. Let's go.

subtitles.original: It's a big door! It's a big door!
subtitles.english: It's a big door! It's a big door!

subtitles.original: Yeah, it is! You got this!
subtitles.english: Yeah, it is! You got this!

subtitles.original: It's okay, I'm Nephilim! I can do this...
subtitles.english: It's okay, I'm Nephilim! I can do this...

subtitles.original: For my beautiful friend! My one-day friend!
subtitles.english: For my beautiful friend! My one-day friend!

subtitles.english: Beautiful friend! I will release thee!

subtitles.english: Why did I bother? Yay! I'm free!

subtitles.original: You can't even let yourself out? Okay.
subtitles.english: You can't even let yourself out? Okay.

subtitles.english: Okay, that was really... okay. I'll let it slide because you freed me.
